name: design-patterns-core
description: Language-agnostic Gang-of-Four design patterns. Three mode entry-point skills (identify, review, refactor-to-pattern) and seventeen pattern primitive skills, grounded in Head First Design Patterns (2nd ed) plus Builder, Prototype, Bridge, and Visitor from the broader GoF / Soshin canon. Pattern skills focus on decisions and anti-patterns; code generation lives in design-patterns-kotlin.
